민수기 7:1.content: On the day that Moses had finished setting up the tabernacle, and had anointed it and sanctified it with all its furniture, and the altar with all its vessels, and had anointed and sanctified them;

민수기 7:2.content: the princes of Israel, the heads of their fathers’ houses, offered. These were the princes of the tribes. These are they who were over those who were counted;

민수기 7:3.content: and they brought their offering before Yahweh, six covered wagons and twelve oxen; a wagon for every two of the princes, and for each one an ox. They presented them before the tabernacle.

민수기 7:5.content: “Accept these from them, that they may be used in doing the service of the Tent of Meeting; and you shall give them to the Levites, to every man according to his service.”

민수기 7:6.content: Moses took the wagons and the oxen, and gave them to the Levites.

민수기 7:7.content: He gave two wagons and four oxen to the sons of Gershon, according to their service.

민수기 7:8.content: He gave four wagons and eight oxen to the sons of Merari, according to their service, under the direction of Ithamar the son of Aaron the priest.

민수기 7:9.content: But to the sons of Kohath he gave none, because the service of the sanctuary belonged to them; they carried it on their shoulders.

민수기 7:10.content: The princes gave offerings for the dedication of the altar in the day that it was anointed. The princes gave their offerings before the altar.

민수기 7:11.content: Yahweh said to Moses, “They shall offer their offering, each prince on his day, for the dedication of the altar.”

민수기 7:12.content: He who offered his offering the first day was Nahshon the son of Amminadab, of the tribe of Judah,

민수기 7:13.content: and his offering was: one silver platter, the weight of which was one hundred thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a meal offering;

민수기 7:14.content: one golden ladle of ten shekels, full of incense;

민수기 7:15.content: one young bull, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;

민수기 7:16.content: one male goat for a sin offering;

민수기 7:17.content: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two head of cattle, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Nahshon the son of Amminadab.

민수기 7:18.content: On the second day Nethanel the son of Zuar, prince of Issachar, gave his offering.

민수기 7:19.content: He offered for his offering: one silver platter, the weight of which was one hundred thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a meal offering;

민수기 7:20.content: one golden ladle of ten shekels, full of incense;

민수기 7:21.content: one young bull, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;

민수기 7:22.content: one male goat for a sin offering;

민수기 7:23.content: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two head of cattle, five rams, five male goats, five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Nethanel the son of Zuar.

민수기 7:24.content: On the third day Eliab the son of Helon, prince of the children of Zebulun,

민수기 7:25.content: gave his offering: one silver platter, the weight of which was a hundred and thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a meal offering;

민수기 7:26.content: one golden ladle of ten shekels, full of incense;

민수기 7:27.content: one young bull, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;

민수기 7:28.content: one male goat for a sin offering;

민수기 7:29.content: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two head of cattle, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Eliab the son of Helon.

민수기 7:30.content: On the fourth day Elizur the son of Shedeur, prince of the children of Reuben,

민수기 7:31.content: gave his offering: one silver platter, the weight of which was one hundred thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a meal offering;

민수기 7:32.content: one golden ladle of ten shekels, full of incense;

민수기 7:33.content: one young bull, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;

민수기 7:34.content: one male goat for a sin offering;

민수기 7:35.content: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two head of cattle, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Elizur the son of Shedeur.

민수기 7:36.content: On the fifth day Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai, prince of the children of Simeon,

민수기 7:37.content: gave his offering: one silver platter, the weight of which was one hundred thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a meal offering;

민수기 7:38.content: one golden ladle of ten shekels, full of incense;

민수기 7:39.content: one young bull, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;

민수기 7:40.content: one male goat for a sin offering;

민수기 7:41.content: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two head of cattle, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old: this was the offering of Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai.

민수기 7:42.content: On the sixth day, Eliasaph the son of Deuel, prince of the children of Gad,

민수기 7:43.content: gave his offering: one silver platter, the weight of which was one hundred thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a meal offering;

민수기 7:44.content: one golden ladle of ten shekels, full of incense;

민수기 7:45.content: one young bull, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;

민수기 7:46.content: one male goat for a sin offering;

민수기 7:47.content: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two head of cattle, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Eliasaph the son of Deuel.

민수기 7:48.content: On the seventh day Elishama the son of Ammihud, prince of the children of Ephraim,

민수기 7:49.content: gave his offering: one silver platter, the weight of which was one hundred thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a meal offering;

민수기 7:50.content: one golden ladle of ten shekels, full of incense;

민수기 7:51.content: one young bull, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;

민수기 7:52.content: one male goat for a sin offering;

민수기 7:53.content: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two head of cattle, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Elishama the son of Ammihud.

민수기 7:54.content: On the eighth day Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur, prince of the children of Manasseh,

민수기 7:55.content: gave his offering: one silver platter, the weight of which was one hundred thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a meal offering;

민수기 7:56.content: one golden ladle of ten shekels, full of incense;

민수기 7:57.content: one young bull, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;

민수기 7:58.content: one male goat for a sin offering;

민수기 7:59.content: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two head of cattle, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur.

민수기 7:60.content: On the ninth day Abidan the son of Gideoni, prince of the children of Benjamin,

민수기 7:61.content: gave his offering: one silver platter, the weight of which was one hundred thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a meal offering;

민수기 7:62.content: one golden ladle of ten shekels, full of incense;

민수기 7:63.content: one young bull, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;

민수기 7:64.content: one male goat for a sin offering;

민수기 7:65.content: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two head of cattle, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Abidan the son of Gideoni.

민수기 7:66.content: On the tenth day Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai, prince of the children of Dan,

민수기 7:67.content: gave his offering: one silver platter, the weight of which was one hundred thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a meal offering;

민수기 7:68.content: one golden ladle of ten shekels, full of incense;

민수기 7:69.content: one young bull, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;

민수기 7:70.content: one male goat for a sin offering;

민수기 7:71.content: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two head of cattle, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai.

민수기 7:72.content: On the eleventh day Pagiel the son of Ochran, prince of the children of Asher,

민수기 7:73.content: gave his offering: one silver platter, the weight of which was one hundred thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a meal offering;

민수기 7:74.content: one golden ladle of ten shekels, full of incense;

민수기 7:75.content: one young bull, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;

민수기 7:76.content: one male goat for a sin offering;

민수기 7:77.content: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two head of cattle, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Pagiel the son of Ochran.

민수기 7:78.content: On the twelfth day Ahira the son of Enan, prince of the children of Naphtali,

민수기 7:79.content: gave his offering: one silver platter, the weight of which was one hundred thirty shekels, one silver bowl of seventy shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of fine flour mixed with oil for a meal offering;

민수기 7:80.content: one golden spoon of ten shekels, full of incense;

민수기 7:81.content: one young bull, one ram, one male lamb a year old, for a burnt offering;

민수기 7:82.content: one male goat for a sin offering;

민수기 7:83.content: and for the sacrifice of peace offerings, two head of cattle, five rams, five male goats, and five male lambs a year old. This was the offering of Ahira the son of Enan.

민수기 7:84.content: This was the dedication offering of the altar, on the day when it was anointed, by the princes of Israel: twelve silver platters, twelve silver bowls, twelve golden ladles;

민수기 7:85.content: each silver platter weighing one hundred thirty shekels, and each bowl seventy; all the silver of the vessels two thousand four hundred shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary;

민수기 7:86.content: the twelve golden ladles, full of incense, weighing ten shekels apiece, according to the shekel of the sanctuary; all the gold of the ladles weighed one hundred twenty shekels;

민수기 7:87.content: all the cattle for the burnt offering twelve bulls, the rams twelve, the male lambs a year old twelve, and their meal offering; and twelve male goats for a sin offering;

민수기 7:88.content: and all the cattle for the sacrifice of peace offerings: twenty-four bulls, sixty rams, sixty male goats, and sixty male lambs a year old. This was the dedication offering of the altar, after it was anointed.

민수기 7:89.content: When Moses went into the Tent of Meeting to speak with Yahweh, he heard his voice speaking to him from above the mercy seat that was on the ark of the Testimony, from between the two cherubim; and he spoke to him.
